race.comment: KING LARRY (4) has three placings from six appearances this preparation and last start finished 1.1 lengths from the winner in third over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Great chance to take this out. HE'S MY WARRIOR (6) got the upper hand late to score by 1.1 lengths last start over 1200m at this track at the second run of the campaign. No reason why he cannot extend this excellent run of form. VIERVILLE (11) raced in the leading division and kept going to score by 0.9 lengths last time out over 1000m here. Nicely placed in this contest. IRISH JIG (13) returns after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Looking to emulate his win at Kembla Grange to kick off the last campaign. Now under the care of new trainer Scott Singleton and comes here with definite top-three claims.
